notes: Simple low confirm into tatsu, dp. Very easy and makes his basic low mixup scary.
Low confirm on crouching opponents. Sacrifices damage and is a worse knockdown, but it's better than whiffing a light tatsu over someones head.

Classic low forward fireball string. Pretty important to learn with Akuma, since up close this will cause a knockdown. At the very tip range of 2MK this won't combo, and from farther ranges it won't knock down and will only do 1680 damage.
Simple heavy combo that doesn't need to confirm standing. Doesn't do much damage sadly, but it is very consistent.
Your main jump-in confirm. Since cl.HP pushes so far out after a jump-in, 214MK recovers fast enough to juggle. If you do this starting with cl.HP and not a jump, do 214LK as usual.
Link from 2LP. Has to be done pretty close, but is nice as a fast punish combo.
Link from 2LP into sweep. Possible on normal hit but is difficult, instead use this as a counterhit combo. If done close enough that the knee part of tatsu hits, you can't juggle into DP.
Your easy light confirm into super. Basic way to spend meter on consistent damage.
Damaging heavy into super combo. The level 3 version is especially potent, but even the level 1 version is worth the bar.
Basic poke into super combo. Requires a bit of close range, especially on standing, but can be a useful whiff punish.
